snippet.title: Town Hall 14 Dev Update - Clash of Clans
snippet.description:
Town Hall 14 is here!  Join Community Manager Darian as he shares the details about the Town Hall 14 update. In this review, he discusses the new Town Hall 14, the new Battle Builder defense, Hero Pets, and more!

Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter в–ә https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram в–әhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook в–әhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-Вӯfilled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

ParentвҖҷs Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

snippet.title: Ш¬ЩҲЩ„ЩҮ ЩҒЩҠ ШәШұЩҒШӘЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШұЩҠШ§Ш¶ рҹҳҚрҹҳҚ| ЩғЩҶШӘ ШӯШ§Щ…Щ„ !!рҹҳұрҹҳұ
snippet.description:
ШіЩ„Ш§Щ… ЩҠШ§ ШӯЩ„ЩҲЩҠЩҶ ..
ШЈЩҶШ§ ШҙШҜШ§ ШЈЩҲ ШЈШҜЩ‘ЩҲ  рҹҘ°
ЩӮЩҶШ§ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩҮШӘЩ… ШЁШ§Щ„ШЈШ№Щ…Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШӯЩҠЩ„Ш© рҹ’ӘрҹҸј

ЩҲШӯШҙШӘЩҲЩҶЩҠ ЩӮШҜ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҶЩҠШ§Ш§Ш§Ш§ ЩҲЩҲШӯШҙЩҶЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҲШӘЩҲЩҠЩҲШЁ ШҢ ШӯШӘЩү Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲЩҶШӘШ§Ш¬ ЩҲШӯШҙЩҶЩҠ рҹҳҚ
ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩ… Щ…ЩҶ Ш§ЩғШӘШұ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲЩҮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҠ Ш·Щ„ШЁШӘЩҲЩҶЩҠ Ш§ШіЩҲЩҠЩҮШ§ ШҢ ЩҲШ§Ш®ЩҠШұШ§Ш§ Ш¬ЩҲЩ„ЩҮ ЩҒЩҠ ШәШұЩҒШӘЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШұЩҠШ§Ш¶
Ш¬Ш§ЩҲШЁШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩ… Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§ШіШҰЩ„ШӘЩғЩ… ЩҲШұШӘШЁШӘ Щ…Ш№Ш§ЩғЩ… Ш§Щ„ШәШұЩҒЩҮ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁШҜШ§ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Ш®Шұ ШҙЩҠ ШіЩҲЩҠШӘ Щ…Ш№Ш§ЩғЩ… Ш¬ЩҲЩ„ЩҮ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШәШұЩҒШ©
Ш§ШӘЩҶЩ…Щү Ш§ЩҶЩғЩ… ШӘЩғЩҲЩҶЩҲШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҠШұ ЩҲШөШҜЩӮЩҲЩҶЩҠ Щ…Ш§ШӘШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ЩҲШ§ ЩғЩ„ ШҜЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШәШұШ§Ш¶ Ш№ШҙШ§ЩҶ ШӘШ№Щ…Щ„ЩҲШ§ Ш§Ш№Щ…Ш§Щ„ ЩҒЩҶЩҠЩҮ ШҢ ШЁШі ШҜШ§ ШҙШәЩ„ЩҠ 
Ш§ШӯШЁЩғЩ… ЩӮШҜ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҶЩҠШ§ ЩҲШҙЩғШұШ§ Ш№Щ„Щү ШөШЁШұЩғЩ… ЩҲШ§ЩҶШӘШёШ§ШұЩғЩ… 


Щ„ЩҲ ЩҒШ§ШӘЩғЩ… Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩҠ ШұШ§Шӯ ШҙЩҲЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШұШ§ШЁШ· :
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WtAtT5ag_8U


Щ„ЩҲ ЩғЩҶШӘ Ш·ЩҒШҙШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШӘЩҒШұШ¬ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲ ШҜШ§ ШұШӯ ЩҠШ№Ш¬ШЁЩғ :
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2p5Tkjo5I9M&t=254s

Ш§ШӘЩ…ЩҶЩү Ш§ЩҶЩғЩ… ШӘШіШӘЩ…ШӘШ№ЩҲШ§ ЩҲШӘШіШӘЩҒЩҠШҜЩҲШ§ рҹҳҚ
Ш§ЩғШӘШЁЩҲЩ„ЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№Щ„ЩҠЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш§ЩҒЩғШ§Шұ Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜШ© Ш§ЩҲ ШәШұЩҠШЁШ© ЩҶЩҒШіЩғЩ… Ш§ШөЩҶШ№ЩҮШ§ ЩҒЩҠ ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲ Ш§Щ„Ш¬Ш§ЩҠ!

Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҶШіЩҲШ§ ШӘШҜШ№Щ…ЩҲЩҶЩҠ ШЁШ§Щ„Щ„Ш§ЩҠЩғ + Ш§Щ„Ш§ШҙШӘШұШ§Щғ рҹ‘ҚрҹҸјрҹ‘ҚрҹҸј
ЩҲЩ„Ш§ ШӘЩҶШіЩҲШ§ ШӘШҙШәЩ„ЩҲШ§ Ш¬ШұШі Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶШЁЩҠШ© Ш№ШҙШ§ЩҶ ЩҠЩҲШөЩ„ЩғЩ… ШӘЩҶШЁЩҠШ© Ш§ЩҲЩ„ Щ…Ш§ Ш§ЩҶШІЩ„ ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲ Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜ
Ш§ЩҶШ§ Ш§ЩҶШІЩ„ ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲ Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜ ЩғЩ„ Ш§ШӯШҜ Ш§Щ„ШіШ§Ш№ЩҮ Щ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШ§ШЎ ШЁШӘЩҲЩӮЩҠШӘ Ш§Щ„ШіШ№ЩҲШҜЩҠШ© ШҜШ§ ШӘЩҲЩӮЩҠШӘ ШұЩ…Ш¶Ш§ЩҶ



ЩҲШҙЩғШұШ§ЩӢ Щ„Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ЩҮШҜШ© Ш§ШҙЩҲЩҒЩғЩ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲ Ш§Щ„Ш¬Ш§ЩҠ рҹӨҡрҹҸј

localized.title: Ш¬ЩҲЩ„ЩҮ ЩҒЩҠ ШәШұЩҒШӘЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШұЩҠШ§Ш¶ рҹҳҚрҹҳҚ| ЩғЩҶШӘ ШӯШ§Щ…Щ„ !!рҹҳұрҹҳұ
localized.description:
ШіЩ„Ш§Щ… ЩҠШ§ ШӯЩ„ЩҲЩҠЩҶ ..
ШЈЩҶШ§ ШҙШҜШ§ ШЈЩҲ ШЈШҜЩ‘ЩҲ  рҹҘ°
ЩӮЩҶШ§ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩҮШӘЩ… ШЁШ§Щ„ШЈШ№Щ…Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШӯЩҠЩ„Ш© рҹ’ӘрҹҸј

ЩҲШӯШҙШӘЩҲЩҶЩҠ ЩӮШҜ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҶЩҠШ§Ш§Ш§Ш§ ЩҲЩҲШӯШҙЩҶЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҲШӘЩҲЩҠЩҲШЁ ШҢ ШӯШӘЩү Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲЩҶШӘШ§Ш¬ ЩҲШӯШҙЩҶЩҠ рҹҳҚ
ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩ… Щ…ЩҶ Ш§ЩғШӘШұ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲЩҮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҠ Ш·Щ„ШЁШӘЩҲЩҶЩҠ Ш§ШіЩҲЩҠЩҮШ§ ШҢ ЩҲШ§Ш®ЩҠШұШ§Ш§ Ш¬ЩҲЩ„ЩҮ ЩҒЩҠ ШәШұЩҒШӘЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШұЩҠШ§Ш¶
Ш¬Ш§ЩҲШЁШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩ… Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§ШіШҰЩ„ШӘЩғЩ… ЩҲШұШӘШЁШӘ Щ…Ш№Ш§ЩғЩ… Ш§Щ„ШәШұЩҒЩҮ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁШҜШ§ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Ш®Шұ ШҙЩҠ ШіЩҲЩҠШӘ Щ…Ш№Ш§ЩғЩ… Ш¬ЩҲЩ„ЩҮ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШәШұЩҒШ©
Ш§ШӘЩҶЩ…Щү Ш§ЩҶЩғЩ… ШӘЩғЩҲЩҶЩҲШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҠШұ ЩҲШөШҜЩӮЩҲЩҶЩҠ Щ…Ш§ШӘШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ЩҲШ§ ЩғЩ„ ШҜЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШәШұШ§Ш¶ Ш№ШҙШ§ЩҶ ШӘШ№Щ…Щ„ЩҲШ§ Ш§Ш№Щ…Ш§Щ„ ЩҒЩҶЩҠЩҮ ШҢ ШЁШі ШҜШ§ ШҙШәЩ„ЩҠ 
Ш§ШӯШЁЩғЩ… ЩӮШҜ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҶЩҠШ§ ЩҲШҙЩғШұШ§ Ш№Щ„Щү ШөШЁШұЩғЩ… ЩҲШ§ЩҶШӘШёШ§ШұЩғЩ… 


Щ„ЩҲ ЩҒШ§ШӘЩғЩ… Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩҠ ШұШ§Шӯ ШҙЩҲЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШұШ§ШЁШ· :
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WtAtT5ag_8U


Щ„ЩҲ ЩғЩҶШӘ Ш·ЩҒШҙШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШӘЩҒШұШ¬ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲ ШҜШ§ ШұШӯ ЩҠШ№Ш¬ШЁЩғ :
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2p5Tkjo5I9M&t=254s

Ш§ШӘЩ…ЩҶЩү Ш§ЩҶЩғЩ… ШӘШіШӘЩ…ШӘШ№ЩҲШ§ ЩҲШӘШіШӘЩҒЩҠШҜЩҲШ§ рҹҳҚ
Ш§ЩғШӘШЁЩҲЩ„ЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№Щ„ЩҠЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш§ЩҒЩғШ§Шұ Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜШ© Ш§ЩҲ ШәШұЩҠШЁШ© ЩҶЩҒШіЩғЩ… Ш§ШөЩҶШ№ЩҮШ§ ЩҒЩҠ ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲ Ш§Щ„Ш¬Ш§ЩҠ!

Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҶШіЩҲШ§ ШӘШҜШ№Щ…ЩҲЩҶЩҠ ШЁШ§Щ„Щ„Ш§ЩҠЩғ + Ш§Щ„Ш§ШҙШӘШұШ§Щғ рҹ‘ҚрҹҸјрҹ‘ҚрҹҸј
ЩҲЩ„Ш§ ШӘЩҶШіЩҲШ§ ШӘШҙШәЩ„ЩҲШ§ Ш¬ШұШі Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶШЁЩҠШ© Ш№ШҙШ§ЩҶ ЩҠЩҲШөЩ„ЩғЩ… ШӘЩҶШЁЩҠШ© Ш§ЩҲЩ„ Щ…Ш§ Ш§ЩҶШІЩ„ ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲ Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜ
Ш§ЩҶШ§ Ш§ЩҶШІЩ„ ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲ Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜ ЩғЩ„ Ш§ШӯШҜ Ш§Щ„ШіШ§Ш№ЩҮ Щ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШ§ШЎ ШЁШӘЩҲЩӮЩҠШӘ Ш§Щ„ШіШ№ЩҲШҜЩҠШ© ШҜШ§ ШӘЩҲЩӮЩҠШӘ ШұЩ…Ш¶Ш§ЩҶ



ЩҲШҙЩғШұШ§ЩӢ Щ„Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ЩҮШҜШ© Ш§ШҙЩҲЩҒЩғЩ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲ Ш§Щ„Ш¬Ш§ЩҠ рҹӨҡрҹҸј

ШҙЩҮШҜШӘ Щ…ШЁШ§ШұШ§Ш© ШұЩҠШ§Щ„ Щ…ШҜШұЩҠШҜ ЩҲШЁШұШҙЩ„ЩҲЩҶШ© Ш§Щ„ЩғШ«ЩҠШұ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§ШөЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш¬Щ…ЩҠЩ„Ш©.

snippet.title: Ш§ЩҲЩ„ ШёЩҮЩҲШұ ШЁШ№ШҜ ЩҲЩҒШ§Ш© Ш§Щ… ШІЩҠШ§ШҜрҹҳў
snippet.description:
Ш§ЩҲЩ„ ШёЩҮЩҲШұ ШЁШ№ШҜ ЩҲЩҒШ§Ш© Ш§Щ… ШІЩҠШ§ШҜрҹҳў
вҷҘвҷҘ  ЩҠШ§ ШұШЁ ЩҠЩғЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲ Ш№Ш¬ШЁЩғЩ… ЩҲЩ…ШӘЩҶШіЩҲШҙ Ш§ШӯЩ„ЩҠ Щ„Ш§ЩҠЩғ ЩҲШ§ШӯЩ„ЩҠ Ш§ШҙШӘШұШ§Щғ ЩҲШӘЩҒШ№ЩҠЩ„ Ш¬ШұШі Щ…ЩҶ Ш§ШӯЩ„ЩҠ Ш§Ш®ЩҲШ§ШӘ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲЩҶ ЩҲШҙЩғШұШ§ЩӢ Щ„ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜЩғЩ… ЩҒЩҠ ШӯЩҠШ§ШӘЩҶШ§ ЩҠШ§ Ш§ШӯЩ„ЩҠ Ш¬Щ…ЩҮЩҲШұ ЩҲШ§Ш®ЩҲШ§ШӘ  вҷҘвҷҘ
вҷҘвҷҘ  Ш§Ш®ЩҲШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ… Ш°ЩҠШ§ШҜ ЩҲЩ…ШӯЩ…ШҜ ЩҲШӯШіЩҶ ЩҲШӯЩ…ШҜЩҠ ЩҲЩҲЩҒШ§ШЎ ЩҲЩ…ШӯЩ…ЩҲШҜ ЩҲШіШӯШұ  вҷҘвҷҘ
ЩҠШ№Щ…Щ„ЩҲШ§ Щ„Ш§ЩҠЩғ Щ„Щ„ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲ ЩҲЩҠШҙШӘШұЩғЩҲШ§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҶШ§Ш© Ш№ШҙШ§ЩҶ ЩҠЩҲШөЩ„ЩҮЩ… ЩғЩ„ Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜ ЩҠШ§ Ш§Ш¬ШҜШ№ Ш§Ш®ЩҲШ§ШӘ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲЩҲЩҲЩҲЩҲЩҲЩҲЩҲЩҲЩҲЩҲЩҶ

snippet.title: #ABtalks with Rawan Bin Hussain - Щ…Ш№ ШұЩҲШ§ЩҶ ШЁЩҶ ШӯШіЩҠЩҶ | Chapter 60
snippet.description:
ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬ ЩҮЩҲ ШіЩ„ШіЩ„Ш© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҲШ§ШұЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШ№ШұШ¶ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҲШӘЩҠЩҲШЁ ЩҲЩҠЩӮШҜЩ…ЩҮШ§ ШЈЩҶШі ШЁЩҲШ®ШҙШҢ ШӯЩҠШ« ЩҠЩғШҙЩҒ Ш§Щ„Ш¬Ш§ЩҶШЁ Ш§Щ„ШөШ§ШҜЩӮ 
ЩҲШ§Щ„ШҘЩҶШіШ§ЩҶЩҠ Щ„Щ„Ш№ШҜЩҠШҜ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ЩҮЩҠШұ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШұЩҠШ§Ш¶ЩҠЩҠЩҶ ЩҲШұЩҲШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№Щ…Ш§Щ„ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ШӨШ«ШұЩҠЩҶ ЩҲЩҠШіЩ„Ш· Ш§Щ„Ш¶ЩҲШЎ Ш№Щ„Щү ЩӮШөШөЩҮЩ… Ш§Щ„ШҘЩҶШіШ§ЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„ЩҮЩ…Ш© ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ШӨШ«ШұШ©. 

Ш¶ЩҠЩҒШӘЩҶШ§ Щ„ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШЁЩҲШ№ ЩҮЩҠ ШұЩҲШ§ЩҶ ШЁЩҶ ШӯШіЩҠЩҶШҢ Ш№Ш§ШұШ¶Ш© ШЈШІЩҠШ§ШЎ ЩҲЩ…ШәЩҶЩҠШ© ЩҲШұШ§ШҰШҜШ© ШЈШ№Щ…Ш§Щ„ ЩғЩҲЩҠШӘЩҠШ© ЩҒЩ„ШіШ·ЩҠЩҶЩҠШ©. ЩҒЩҠ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ„ЩӮШ©  ШӘШ®ШЁШұЩҶШ§ ШұЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш№ЩҶ ЩӮШөШӘЩҮШ§ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШІЩҲШ§Ш¬ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮШӘЩҮШ§ ЩғШҙШ§ШЁШ© ЩҲШЈЩ… Ш№ШІШЁШ§ШЎ.

#ABtalks is a YouTube interview show hosted by Anas Bukhash that shines the spotlight on the raw side of celebrities, influencers, and achievers as human beings. Each guest is known for being an inspiration and for being influential as experts in their respective fields. 

Rawan Bin Hussain is a Kuwaiti Palestinian model, singer and entrepreneur. Having endured some of her most difficult days over the past one year, Rawan talks about marriage and divorce, motherhood, her career, and how she is dealing with her ailing mother.

Produced by: Bukhash Brothers

Website: https://www.abtalks.ae

Watch Partner: Breitling | https://bit.ly/3nrXQZJ

00:49 - How are you really doing?
10:10 - Why didnвҖҷt we release the first episode?В 
13:15 - The story of RawanвҖҷs relationship.
26:41 - Rawan, do you feel that youвҖҷre impulsive?
29:44 - How was your childhood?
30:01 - How is your relationship with your parents?
30:52 - You faced a lot of bullying in school.
36:04 - Some people say, вҖңRawan is dumb.вҖқ
46:01 - Are you thinking about getting married again?
50:52 - WhatвҖҷs your favorite color? And 3 reasons why.
51:23 - WhatвҖҷs your favorite animal? And 3 reasons why.
53:09 - What are you afraid of?
54:56 - WhatвҖҷs the best moment of your life?В 
1:00:07 - Worst moment in your life?В 
1:11:31 - If we take RawanвҖҷs heart and put it in front of you, what would it tell you?
1:12:40 - 'Rawan' in one word?
1:14:42 - Luna shouldnвҖҷt be filling a gap, but she is today.

#GoldarmGang #Brawlstars #Belle

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but donвҖҷt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your teamвҖҷs safe and try to crack open your opponentsвҖҷ. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove youвҖҷre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support вҖ” or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

ШұШ§ШЁШ· Ш§ЩҶШіШӘЩӮШұШ§Щ…ЩҠ  ШӘШ§ШЁШ№ЩҲЩҶЩҠ Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩҮ : https://instagram.com/lifeassara2004?igshid=11lsahztajz61

Ш§ШӯШ¶ШұЩҲШ§ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲ ШЁШӘЩӮЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ ( 1080p ) Ш№ШҙШ§ЩҶ ШӘШҙЩҲЩҒЩҲ ЩғЩ„ШҙЩҠ ШЁЩҲШ¶ЩҲШӯ 

~ Ш§ШіШҰЩ„Ш© ЩҲ Ш§Ш¬ЩҲШЁШ© ШіШұЩҠШ№Ш© ~

Ш§Щ„ЩғШ§Щ…ЩҠШұШ§ : canon 800D 
ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲЩҶШӘШ§Ш¬ : final cut pro 


Ш§ШіЩ…Ш§ШҰЩҠ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ЩҲШ§ЩӮШ№ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҲШ§ШөЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш§Ш№ЩҠ : 
Ш§ЩҶШіШӘШ¬ШұШ§Щ… : lifeassara2004

* Щ…ЩҮЩ… ШӘШӘШ§ШЁШ№ЩҲЩҶЩҠ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҶШіШӘШ¬ШұШ§Щ… ШұШӯ ЩҠЩғЩҲЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ ЩғШӘЩҠШұ Ш§ШҙЩҠШ§ШЎ Щ…Ш№ШӘЩ…ШҜЩҮ*


Ш§ШҙШӘШұЩғЩҲШ§ ШЁШ§Щ„ЩӮЩҶШ§Ш© Щ„ЩҶЩҲШөЩ„ Щ„ ЩЈ Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶ ШҢШҢ Ш§ЩҶШҙШұЩҲШ§ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҶШ§Ш© ШЁЩғЩ„ Щ…ЩғШ§ЩҶ рҹҘә.



(Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҶШіЩҲ ШӘШӯШ·ЩҲ Щ„Ш§ЩҠЩғ ШЁШҜЩҶШ§ ЩҶЩҲШөЩ„ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҠШҜЩҠЩҲ Щ§Щ  Ш§Щ„ЩҒ Щ„Ш§ЩҠЩғ )

snippet.title: OUR INTIMATE WEDDING | Jessy Mendiola
snippet.description:
LUIS MANZANO & JESSY MENDIOLA INTIMATE WEDDING

Hopefully, after watching the video, youвҖҷll have huge smiles on your faces and only feel love because with everything thatвҖҷs been happening in the world, thatвҖҷs all we want, to share the love and spread some joy to everyone. вқӨпёҸ

To the whole team, we are grateful for each and everyone of you. Thank you for making our wedding day extra special. вқӨпёҸ

#JessGotLucky
#LuisAndJessyWedding
#OurIntimateWedding

SPECIAL THANKS TO OUR WEDDING TEAM:

Videography: Bob Nicolas and team
Phototography: Caliber King and team (Pat DyвҖҷs team) 
Venue styling: Gideon Hermosa and team 

Jessy Mendiola 

Glam Team:
Makeup: Kusie Ho
Hair: Anton Papa
Stylist: Patty Yap

Sponsors:
Wedding dress: Patricia Santos
Shoes: Jefferson Si
Nails: ExtraOrdinail
Eyelash Extensions: New Lounge


Luis Manzano: 

Glam Team:
Grooming: Peps Selvestre
Stylist: Rex Atienza/ Jay Sarmiento
Suit by: Paulo Lazaro 

Wedding planner and coordination:  
вҖңTHEвҖқ Joanne Angeles, we LOVE you. Thank you for organizing everything. 
Wedding bands and jewelry: 
Manila Diamond Studio
Intimate dinner sponsored by Lyka and The Farm (special mention to Gibby, Ms. Jenny, Apple and Mr. Preet Singh)
Wedding cake: Celestially Baked 
Special thanks to Ranvel Rufino for helping us out with the venue.
To my sister Meggy, thank you for being by my side the whole time. I love you. 
And of course to Mayor Eric Africa for accommodating us despite his busy schedule.

Please do send me your comments after watching the video and don't forget to subscribe!  вқӨпёҸвқӨпёҸвқӨпёҸ

Welcome & enjoy! 

Live life.
Love life.

Love,
Senorita Jessy рҹҢәрҹ’Ӣ

snippet.title: Brawl Stars: Brawl Talk! Two New Brawlers, TONS of Skins, and a New Game mode!?
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! в–әв–ә https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! в–әв–ә https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but donвҖҷt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your teamвҖҷs safe and try to crack open your opponentsвҖҷ. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove youвҖҷre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support вҖ” or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

en.title: Brawl Stars: Brawl Talk! Two New Brawlers, TONS of Skins, and a New Game mode!?
en.description:
Download NOW!! в–әв–ә https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! в–әв–ә https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but donвҖҷt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your teamвҖҷs safe and try to crack open your opponentsвҖҷ. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove youвҖҷre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support вҖ” or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

snippet.title: Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШЈШұШҜЩҶЩҠ ШӯЩ…ШІШ© ШЁЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШіЩҠЩҶ ЩҠЩӮЩҲЩ„ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШіШ¬ЩҠЩ„ Щ…ШөЩҲШұ ШҘЩҶЩҮ ЩӮЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩӮШ§Щ…Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШЁШұЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҶШІЩ„ЩҮ
snippet.description:
ЩғШҙЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШЈШұШҜЩҶЩҠ ШӯЩ…ШІШ© ШЁЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШіЩҠЩҶ ШЈЩҶЩҮ ЩӮЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩӮШ§Щ…Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШЁШұЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҶШІЩ„ЩҮ ЩҲШӘЩ… Ш§Ш№ШӘЩӮШ§Щ„ ШӯШұШіЩҮ Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш§ШөШҢ ЩҲШіШ· ШӘЩҲЩӮЩҠЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„Ш·Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШұШҜЩҶЩҠШ© ШҙШ®ШөЩҠШ§ШӘ ШЁЩҠЩҶЩҮШ§ ШұШҰЩҠШі Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„ЩғЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШЁЩӮ ШЁШ§ШіЩ… ШҘШЁШұШ§ЩҮЩҠЩ… Ш№ЩҲШ¶ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ ЩҲШўШ®ШұЩҲЩҶ Щ„ШЈШіШЁШ§ШЁ ШЈЩ…ЩҶЩҠШ© Щ„Щ… ШӘЩғШҙЩҒ ШӘЩҒШ§ШөЩҠЩ„ЩҮШ§ ШӯШӘЩү Ш§Щ„ШўЩҶ ЩҲЩӮШ§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ЩҠШұ ШӯЩ…ШІШ© ШЁЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШіЩҠЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШіШ¬ЩҠЩ„ Щ…ШөЩҲШұ "ШЈШіШӘШәШұШЁ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШӨШҜЩҠ Ш§ЩҶШӘЩӮШ§ШҜЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁШіЩҠШ· Щ„Щ„ШіЩҠШ§ШіШ§ШӘ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„Ш§ШҜ ШҘЩ„Щү ШӘШ№ШұШ¶ЩҠ Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӯШӘШ¬Ш§ШІ"ШҢ Щ…Ш¶ЩҠЩҒШ§ ШЈЩҶ "ЩӮШ§ШҰШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҠШҙ ШЈШЁЩ„ШәЩҶЩҠ ШЁШ§Щ„ШЁЩӮШ§ШЎ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҶШІЩ„ЩҠ ЩҲШ№ШҜЩ… Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘШөШ§Щ„ ШЁШЈЩҠ ШҙШ®Шө" ЩҲШЈШ¶Ш§ЩҒ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШіШ¬ЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШөЩҲШұ "Щ„ШіШӘ ШіШЁШЁШ§ Щ„Щ„Ш®ШұШ§ШЁ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШҜЩ…Ш§Шұ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ Щ…Ші Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӨШіШіШ§ШӘ"ШҢ ЩғЩ…Ш§ ЩӮШ§Щ„ "ШЈЩҶШ§ Щ„ШіШӘ Ш¬ШІШЎШ§ Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩҠ Щ…ШӨШ§Щ…ШұШ© ШЈЩҲ ШӘШӯШ§Щ„ЩҒШҢ ЩҲЩ…Ш§ ЩҠЩҮЩ…ЩҶЩҠ ЩҮЩҲ Щ…ШөЩ„ШӯШ© ЩҲШ·ЩҶЩҠ".
=============

localized.description:
ЩғШҙЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШЈШұШҜЩҶЩҠ ШӯЩ…ШІШ© ШЁЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШіЩҠЩҶ ШЈЩҶЩҮ ЩӮЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩӮШ§Щ…Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШЁШұЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҶШІЩ„ЩҮ ЩҲШӘЩ… Ш§Ш№ШӘЩӮШ§Щ„ ШӯШұШіЩҮ Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш§ШөШҢ ЩҲШіШ· ШӘЩҲЩӮЩҠЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„Ш·Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШұШҜЩҶЩҠШ© ШҙШ®ШөЩҠШ§ШӘ ШЁЩҠЩҶЩҮШ§ ШұШҰЩҠШі Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„ЩғЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШЁЩӮ ШЁШ§ШіЩ… ШҘШЁШұШ§ЩҮЩҠЩ… Ш№ЩҲШ¶ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ ЩҲШўШ®ШұЩҲЩҶ Щ„ШЈШіШЁШ§ШЁ ШЈЩ…ЩҶЩҠШ© Щ„Щ… ШӘЩғШҙЩҒ ШӘЩҒШ§ШөЩҠЩ„ЩҮШ§ ШӯШӘЩү Ш§Щ„ШўЩҶ ЩҲЩӮШ§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ЩҠШұ ШӯЩ…ШІШ© ШЁЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШіЩҠЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШіШ¬ЩҠЩ„ Щ…ШөЩҲШұ "ШЈШіШӘШәШұШЁ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШӨШҜЩҠ Ш§ЩҶШӘЩӮШ§ШҜЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁШіЩҠШ· Щ„Щ„ШіЩҠШ§ШіШ§ШӘ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„Ш§ШҜ ШҘЩ„Щү ШӘШ№ШұШ¶ЩҠ Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӯШӘШ¬Ш§ШІ"ШҢ Щ…Ш¶ЩҠЩҒШ§ ШЈЩҶ "ЩӮШ§ШҰШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҠШҙ ШЈШЁЩ„ШәЩҶЩҠ ШЁШ§Щ„ШЁЩӮШ§ШЎ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҶШІЩ„ЩҠ ЩҲШ№ШҜЩ… Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘШөШ§Щ„ ШЁШЈЩҠ ШҙШ®Шө" ЩҲШЈШ¶Ш§ЩҒ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШіШ¬ЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШөЩҲШұ "Щ„ШіШӘ ШіШЁШЁШ§ Щ„Щ„Ш®ШұШ§ШЁ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШҜЩ…Ш§Шұ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ Щ…Ші Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӨШіШіШ§ШӘ"ШҢ ЩғЩ…Ш§ ЩӮШ§Щ„ "ШЈЩҶШ§ Щ„ШіШӘ Ш¬ШІШЎШ§ Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩҠ Щ…ШӨШ§Щ…ШұШ© ШЈЩҲ ШӘШӯШ§Щ„ЩҒШҢ ЩҲЩ…Ш§ ЩҠЩҮЩ…ЩҶЩҠ ЩҮЩҲ Щ…ШөЩ„ШӯШ© ЩҲШ·ЩҶЩҠ".

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! рҹ‘Җ


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter в–ә https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram в–әhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook в–әhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-Вӯfilled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

ParentвҖҷs Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

snippet.title: Glitterbomb Trap Catches Phone Scammer (who gets arrested)
snippet.description:
I glitterbombed my way up the scammer chain of command.  Come join me in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agencyвҖҷs website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

Go watch JimвҖҷs video to see how he located the scammers and subscribe to his channel- 
https://youtu.be/Xvjjpzyiig4

Go check out Perog's version here too- 
https://youtu.be/J4mkZU2Y0as

New music this time from the talented Laura Shigihara- https://open.spotify.com/track/1zOzvy6SeVJs2MEET7vyCW?si=f3fee98828fa4802

Karda rahen ignore ve mainu

Marjaaneya tu hun nahi karda pyar..Asi tere nahi rehna

Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda
Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda

Kade bahr laja
Koi film dikha
Kade pyar naal
Koi gal sunaa
Banya rehnaa talwar asi tere nai rehna
Marjaneya
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna

Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda
Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda

Sanu milna nahi

snippet.description:

snippet.title: Rawan - Kan Ya Ma Kan (2021) [Official Music Video] / ШұЩҲШ§ЩҶ - ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҠШ§ Щ…Ш§ ЩғШ§ЩҶ
snippet.description:
On International WomenвҖҷs Day, This is dedicated to every woman out there, remember always! YOUвҖҷRE NOT ALONE.

Love yourself first.

ЩҒЩҠ ЩҠЩҲЩ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШЈШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШҢ ШЈЩҮШҜЩҠ Щ„ЩғЩ„ ЩҶШіШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… ШЈШәЩҶЩҠШӘЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҲЩ„ЩүШҢ ШӘШ°ЩғШұЩҶ ШҜЩҲЩ…Ш§ЩӢ! "Щ„ШіШӘЩҶ ЩҲШӯШҜЩғЩҶ
."ЩҲШЈШӯШЁЩ‘ЩҠ ЩҶЩҒШіЩғ ШЈЩҲЩ„Ш§ЩӢ

Ш§Ш®ШұШ§Ш¬ / Directed By: Richa Sarkis
ЩғЩ„Щ…Ш§ШӘ / Lyrics By: Amro Al Masri
Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§ЩҶ / Composed By: Samer Abo Taleb
ШӘЩҲШІЩҠШ№ / Arranged By: Omar Ismail

...........................

Щ…ЩғЩҠШ§Ш¬ / Makeup By: Bouba
ШҙШ№Шұ / Hair By: Assaad Hair Design

Lyrics | ЩғЩ„Щ…Ш§ШӘ

ЩҒЩҠ Ш§ЩҲ Щ…Ш§ЩҒЩҠШҙ 
ШҜЩҠ ШӯШ§Ш¬ЩҮ Щ…ШӘШ®ШөЩҶЩҠШҙ 
Ш§ШӘШ№ЩҲШҜШӘ Ш§ЩҶШ§ Щ…ШҙШӘЩғЩҠШҙ 
ЩҲЩ…ЩӮЩҲЩ„Шҙ ШӯШ§Ш¬ЩҮ Ш№ЩҶЩҠ 
.......
ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҠШ§Щ…Ш§ ЩғШ§ЩҶ 
ЩғЩҶШӘ ШЁШӯЩғЩҠЩ„Щғ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ 
ЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠ Щ…ЩҲЩҮЩҲЩ… ШЁШ§Щ„ШЈЩ…Ш§ЩҶ 
ШЁШ№Щ„ЩҶ ШҜЩ„ЩҲЩӮШӘЩҠ Ш§ЩҶЩҠ 
........
ШЁШӘШ®Щ„ЩҠ Ш§ЩҶШ§ Ш№ЩҶ Ш§ЩҠ ШӯШ§Ш¬ЩҮ ЩғШ§ЩҶШӘ ШұШЁШ·Ш§ЩҶЩҠ ШЁЩҠЩғ 
ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ Щ…Ш§ ЩҮЩҠШөШ№ШЁ Ш№Щ„ЩҠШ§ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩ…Ш№ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ ЩҒ Ш№ЩҶЩҠЩғ 
ЩҲШЁШӯЩӮ Щ…ЩҶШ§ Ш¶ЩҠШ№ШӘ Ш№Щ…ШұЩҠ ЩҲЩҲЩӮШӘ ЩғШЁЩҠШұ Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩғ 
ШЁШҜШ№ЩҠ ЩҠШ§ШұШЁ Ш§ШҙЩҲЩҒ ЩҒЩҠ ЩҠЩҲЩ… Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ ЩҒЩҠШ§ ЩҒЩҠЩғ 
..........
Ш§ЩҶШ§ Ш®ШҜШӘ Ш§ЩҠЩҮ Щ…ЩҶ ШӯШЁЩҠ Щ„ЩҠЩғ ШәЩҠШұ Ш§ЩҶЩҠ ЩҲШ¬Ш№ШӘ ЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠ 
ЩҲШ¬ЩҠШӘ Ш№Щ„ЩҠШ§ ЩғШӘЩҠШұ Ш№ШҙШ§ЩҶЩғ ЩҲШ§ШіШӘШӯЩ…Щ„ШӘ  ШӘШ№ШЁЩҠ
ЩғШ§ЩҶ ШұШҜ ЩҒШ№Щ„Щғ Ш¶ШҜ ЩҒШ№Щ„ЩҠ ЩҲШ№ЩҶЩғ ШЁШӘШҜШ§ЩҒШ№Щ„ЩҠ 
Ш®Щ„ШөШӘ ШӯЩғШ§ЩҠШӘЩғ Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩҮШ§ШұШҜЩҮ ЩҲЩҒЩҠЩғ ЩҒЩҲШ¶ШӘ Ш§Щ…ШұЩҠ
..........
Щ…ЩҠЩҶ ШӯШЁ Щ…ЩҠЩҶ 
ЩҲЩ…ЩҠЩҶ Ш¶ШӯЩҠ ШЁШӯЩҠШ§ШӘЩҮ ШіЩҶЩҠЩҶ 
ЩҲШҙЩҲЩҒШӘ Ш§ШӯЩҶШ§ ЩҲШөЩ„ЩҶШ§ Щ„ЩҒЩҠЩҶ 
ШЁШіШЁШЁЩғ ЩҠШ§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ ЩӮЩ„ШЁЩғ Щ…Ш§ШӘ 
............
Ш§ЩҶШіШ§ЩҶ Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜ 
Ш№Ш§ЩҠШҙ Ш¬ЩҶШЁЩҠ Щ„ЩғЩҶ ШЁШ№ЩҠШҜ 
Щ…Шҙ ШҜЩҮ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ Ш§ЩҶШ§ ШӯШЁЩҠШӘЩҮ Ш§ЩғЩҠШҜ 
ЩҲШ§ЩҶШіЩҠ Щ…Ш§ЩҒЩҠШҙ ШЁЩҠЩҶШ§ ШӯЩғШ§ЩҠШ§ШӘ


#Rawan 
#KanYamaKan 
#ШұЩҲШ§ЩҶ
#ЩғШ§ЩҶЩҖЩҠШ§Щ…Ш§ЩҖЩғШ§ЩҶ

ЩғШ§ЩҶ ШұШҜ ЩҒШ№Щ„Щғ Ш¶ШҜ ЩҒШ№Щ„ЩҠ ЩҲШ№ЩҶЩғ ШЁШӘШҜШ§ЩҒШ№Щ„ЩҠ 
Ш®Щ„ШөШӘ ШӯЩғШ§ЩҠШӘЩғ Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩҮШ§ШұШҜЩҮ ЩҲЩҒЩҠЩғ ЩҒЩҲШ¶ШӘ Ш§Щ…ШұЩҠ
..........
Щ…ЩҠЩҶ ШӯШЁ Щ…ЩҠЩҶ 
ЩҲЩ…ЩҠЩҶ Ш¶ШӯЩҠ ШЁШӯЩҠШ§ШӘЩҮ ШіЩҶЩҠЩҶ 
ЩҲШҙЩҲЩҒШӘ Ш§ШӯЩҶШ§ ЩҲШөЩ„ЩҶШ§ Щ„ЩҒЩҠЩҶ 
ШЁШіШЁШЁЩғ ЩҠШ§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ ЩӮЩ„ШЁЩғ Щ…Ш§ШӘ 
............
Ш§ЩҶШіШ§ЩҶ Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜ 
Ш№Ш§ЩҠШҙ Ш¬ЩҶШЁЩҠ Щ„ЩғЩҶ ШЁШ№ЩҠШҜ 
Щ…Шҙ ШҜЩҮ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ Ш§ЩҶШ§ ШӯШЁЩҠШӘЩҮ Ш§ЩғЩҠШҜ 
ЩҲШ§ЩҶШіЩҠ Щ…Ш§ЩҒЩҠШҙ ШЁЩҠЩҶШ§ ШӯЩғШ§ЩҠШ§ШӘ
